title: Mini Gnawler Bones, Dog Treats, Beef & Chicken Flavour, Delicious Chews to Keep Dog Busy 2 Pack (Beef)
features: DUAL FLAVOUR VARIETY: PureBreed Mini Gnawler Bones come in two delicious flavours - Beef and Chicken - to keep your dog entertained and satisfied
PERFECT SIZE: Mini bones are ideal for small to medium-sized dogs, providing the perfect chewing experience to keep your dog busy and engaged
QUALITY TREATS: Made to provide delicious chews that dogs love whilst supporting their natural chewing instincts and helping to maintain dental health
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Each pack contains multiple mini gnawler bones, offering great value and ensuring you have treats ready whenever your dog deserves a reward
TRUSTED BRAND: PureBreed is committed to creating quality pet products that prioritise your dog's enjoyment and wellbeing
description: Product description PureBreed Mini Gnawler Bones are delicious treats designed to keep your dog busy and satisfied. These tasty chews come in two irresistible flavours - savoury Beef and mouth-watering Chicken - ensuring there's something to delight every canine companion. Perfect for dogs who love to gnaw and chew, these mini bones provide an engaging activity that helps occupy your pet whilst delivering great taste. The convenient mini size makes them ideal for dogs of various breeds and sizes, offering a rewarding treat without overindulging. Whether you're looking to keep your furry friend entertained, reward good behaviour, or simply show them some love, these gnawler bones are an excellent choice. Each pack contains multiple bones, providing lasting enjoyment for your beloved pet. Keep your dog happy, busy, and content with these flavourful chewing treats that combine quality ingredients with satisfying texture. Ingredients Meat and Animal Derivatives (48% Duck), Derivatives of Vegetable Origin, Cereals, Sorbitol, Salt. Analytical constituents: Crude Protein (10%), Crude Fat (1.5%). Crude Ash (8%), Crude Fibre (1.5%), Moisture (30%). Directions Pet Dog Treats Bites Dry Duck Cubes See more
